lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: It's beautiful, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is?

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Everything! The wonders right here in this museum, collected from all corners of the land.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess it is, you're right.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Matter of fact, I consider myself quite the collector. I keep a record of just about everything that I find!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Would you like one? You could keep track of your own collections.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that sounds helpful!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks. I think I'll pass.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: I should've guessed you wouldn't understand the true beauty of a good collection!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: There! Now you'll be able to see the true beauty of everything you collect on your adventures.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: You might struggle to carry that right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... I'll come back when I'm carrying a little less.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Don't you have one lying around somewhere already?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think you're right!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you count how many uniques I've obtained in my collection?

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: I'd love to count everything you've collected on your adventures!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: You might want to take a seat this could take a while.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: From what I can see you have collected [number] items in your collection!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: You've made a good start at filling your collection, keep at it!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: I see you are just starting out on your collecting adventure. I wish you luck!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: You've made a good start at filling your collection, keep at it!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: You're starting to get a hang of this collecting business!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: You have a very respectable collection indeed, one day you'll have a better collection than me!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Your collection is maturing well, you're making great strides to becoming a top collector, keep it up!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Your collection is one of the finest I've seen, it's almost on par with mine!!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Colour me impressed, you've collected more items than me! I look forward to seeing your collection grow even more.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Now that's an impressive collection, I haven't seen many with a collection better than yours!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: I can officially say that you are now an elite collector and few can stand as your equal in that regard.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Wait, you finished it? You actually finished the entire collection? I never thought that was even possible!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: As an accomplished collector I'd like to offer you a special reward.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Actually, it appears you already have all the rewards I'd like to give you.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: It's beautiful, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is?

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: This... idea! The idea of something nice! Those nice little tokens!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What tokens?

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Oh, er... never you mind!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some tokens!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Only some? Well you need more! Until you have them, I should get going...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, I've got this wonderful collection of tokens!

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: May I see them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, here they are.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: May I have them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I suppose you can.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: The Collector
lines.text: Fine.
